JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. A fire starts on a security monitor, an expression flickers across a video call, or a product a viewer wants flashes by in a livestream. Yet today's large models remain mostly turn-based by design: they answer only when addressed, and eve
articles.summary: JoyAI-VL-Interaction 提出实时视觉-语言交互智能框架，突破现有大模型"仅在被提问时才响应"的局限。系统能主动感知安防摄像头起火、视频通话中的表情变化、直播中一闪而过的商品等事件，无需用户主动触发即可实时做出反应，填补了多模态模型在主动感知场景中的空白。

articles.title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories
articles.excerpt: Data tells stories that shape society; the data journalist's job is to turn raw information into stories non-experts can trust. A high-quality news feature takes a newsroom team weeks: hunting for context, running statistics, choosing an angle, and designing visuals. Recent agents handle individual
articles.summary: 数据新闻智能体系统，能将原始数据自动转化为可验证的多模态新闻报道。传统数据新闻报道需编辑团队数周完成选题、统计分析、视觉设计等环节，该系统通过智能体协作将全流程自动化，输出结论可追溯、图文并茂的新闻特稿，大幅降低数据驱动报道的生产门槛。

articles.title: Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning
articles.excerpt: Generalist robot policies must follow user instructions while reasoning about how objects, cameras, and robot actions interact in the 3D physical world. Recent vision-language-action models (VLAs) and video world-action models (WAMs) inherit strong semantic or temporal priors from large-scale founda
articles.summary: 面向机器人策略学习的几何动作模型（GAM），使通用机器人策略在执行指令时能对物体、相机与动作在三维物理世界中的交互关系进行几何推理。相比仅继承语义或时序先验的视觉-语言-动作模型，GAM 显式建模三维几何结构，提升了机器人在复杂物理场景中的泛化能力。

articles.title: DreamX-World 1.0: A General-Purpose Interactive World Model
articles.excerpt: DreamX-World 1.0 is a general-purpose interactive text/image-to-video world model for controllable long-horizon generation. It supports camera navigation, revisits to previously observed regions, and promptable events across photorealistic, game-style, and stylized domains. Our data engine combines
articles.summary: DreamX-World 1.0 是通用交互式世界模型，支持文本/图像驱动的可控长时程视频生成。模型支持相机导航、对已观测区域的重访以及可提示事件触发，覆盖写实、游戏风格和风格化等多种视觉域，通过专用数据引擎构建训练数据，为具身智能和游戏仿真提供统一底座。

articles.title: FastContext: Training Efficient Repository Explorer for Coding Agents
articles.excerpt: Large Language Model (LLM) coding agents have achieved strong results on software engineering tasks, yet repository exploration remains a major bottleneck: locating relevant code consumes substantial token budget and pollutes the agent's context with irrelevant snippets. In most agents, the same mod
articles.summary: FastContext 提出高效代码仓库探索器，专为编程智能体设计。现有智能体在定位相关代码时消耗大量 token 预算并污染上下文，FastContext 训练专用轻量模型替代通用 LLM 执行仓库导航，在保持准确率的同时显著降低 token 开销，缓解了代码智能体的上下文瓶颈问题。

articles.title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
articles.excerpt: This technical report introduces VibeThinker-3B, a compact dense model with 3B parameters developed to investigate how far verifiable reasoning can be pushed within a strictly small-model regime. Building upon the Spectrum-to-Signal post-training paradigm, we systematically enhance the model through
articles.summary: VibeThinker-3B 是一个仅有 30 亿参数的紧凑稠密模型，旨在探索小模型在可验证推理方面的能力边界。基于 Spectrum-to-Signal 后训练范式，通过系统化增强策略，在严格的小模型规格限制下显著提升逻辑推理与数学证明等可验证任务的性能。

articles.title: Who Should Lead Decoding Now? Tracking Reliable Trajectories for Ensembling Masked Diffusion Language Models
articles.excerpt: Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) have emerged as a distinct paradigm for sequence generation. As MDLMs become diverse in capabilities and knowledge coverage, an important question is how to combine their knowledge. Toward this, we first investigate the unique decoding dynamics of MDLMs. We f
articles.summary: 研究掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）的解码动态，并提出可靠轨迹追踪方法以实现多模型集成。论文首先揭示了 MDLM 独特的解码过程特性，在此基础上提出动态选择解码领导者的机制，通过集成多个能力互补的 MDLM 提升生成质量，填补了该领域模型协作的研究空白。

articles.title: VisualClaw: A Real-Time, Personalized Agent for the Physical World
articles.excerpt: Vision language models are serving as general-purpose interfaces for complex multimodal tasks. However, deployment still faces three gaps: VLMs typically incur high latency and cost when processing dense video frames and long prompts, the agent scaffold remains static after deployment, and standard
articles.summary: VisualClaw 是面向物理世界的实时个性化视觉-语言智能体，针对三大部署痛点进行优化：高密度视频帧与长提示词导致的高延迟高成本、部署后静态的智能体框架、以及标准评测与真实应用场景的脱节。系统通过动态帧压缩与在线自适应机制，实现低延迟个性化的物理世界交互。

articles.title: OneRank: Unified Transformer-Native Ranking Architecture for Multi-Task Recommendation
articles.excerpt: Multi-task learning (MTL) is essential in recommender systems to enable complementary learning among diverse user feedback. While modern industrial practices have shifted from DNNs to Transformer-centric architectures to strengthen sequence modeling and scaling capacity, they still decouple feature
articles.summary: OneRank 提出统一的 Transformer 原生多任务推荐排序架构，将特征交互、序列建模与多目标优化整合为单一架构，避免现有工业系统中特征提取与排序模块解耦带来的信息损失，在多路反馈信号的互补学习中实现更好的扩展性和任务协同效果。

articles.title: BadWorld: Adversarial Attacks on World Models
articles.excerpt: Visual world models (VWMs) synthesize interactive, action-conditioned rollouts from a single context image. However, it remains an open question how robust these models are to adversarial perturbations. Standard adversarial attacks fail to assess this vulnerability because attackers lack ground-trut
articles.summary: BadWorld 研究视觉世界模型（VWM）对抗攻击的鲁棒性问题。现有对抗攻击方法难以评估 VWM 的漏洞，因为攻击者缺乏真实动态的ground truth。论文提出专针对 VWM 的对抗攻击框架，系统揭示单张上下文图像驱动的交互式世界模型在对抗扰动下的脆弱性。

articles.title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
articles.excerpt: We introduce Qwen-RobotWorld, a language-conditioned video world model for embodied intelligence. With natural language as a unified action interface, it predicts physically grounded future visual trajectories from current observations across robotic manipulation, autonomous driving, indoor navigati
articles.summary: Qwen-RobotWorld 是面向具身智能的语言条件视频世界模型，以自然语言为统一动作接口，从当前观测预测物理合理的未来视觉轨迹，覆盖机器人操作、自动驾驶和室内导航等多场景。该模型将语言理解与物理世界预测统一，为跨域具身任务提供通用世界建模能力。

articles.title: TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: As LLM agents are deployed in long-horizon sessions, context accumulation drives up inference costs. Existing approaches utilize text pruning or dynamic memory eviction to minimize token footprints; however, their unconstrained sequence mutations alter layouts, introducing prefix mismatches and cach
articles.summary: TokenPilot 提出面向 LLM 智能体的缓存高效上下文管理方案。在长时程任务中，上下文累积推高推理成本，现有文本剪枝或动态内存淘汰方法因改变序列布局而破坏前缀缓存命中率。TokenPilot 在压缩上下文的同时保持 KV 缓存前缀结构不变，大幅降低多轮推理的计算开销。

articles.title: Pythagoras-Prover: Advancing Efficient Formal Proving via Augmented Lean Formalisation
articles.excerpt: Modern Lean theorem provers achieve strong performance only with substantial training and inference compute, driven in part by scarce verified proof data and the long reasoning traces of formal proof search, making both supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and sampling expensive. We introduce Pythagoras-Pro
articles.summary: Pythagoras-Prover 通过增强 Lean 形式化数据提升自动定理证明效率。针对 Lean 证明器依赖大量训练与推理算力、形式化证明数据稀缺的问题，提出数据增强策略扩充训练集并缩短推理轨迹，在降低 SFT 与采样成本的同时保持强劲的证明性能。

articles.title: CODA-BENCH: Can Code Agents Handle Data-Intensive Tasks?
articles.excerpt: Advanced agents are increasingly demonstrating the potential to operate as autonomous engineers, creating a growing demand for evaluation benchmarks that capture the complexity of real-world development. Such environments typically involve both complex code and large-scale data (i.e., file system).
articles.summary: CODA-BENCH 是首个专门评估代码智能体处理数据密集型任务能力的基准。真实工程环境通常同时涉及复杂代码逻辑与大规模数据（文件系统），现有基准未能充分覆盖此类场景。CODA-BENCH 系统评估智能体在代码与大规模数据交织场景下的自主工程能力。

articles.title: Where Did It Go Wrong? Process-Level Evaluation of Web Agents with Semantic State Tracking

articles.excerpt: 《法兰克福汇报》分析文章指出，随着人工智能越来越多地进入经济和日常生活领域，全球经济对台湾的依赖也在进一步加深。而不断加剧的台海紧张局势，则凸显了这种依赖的高度风险。《新苏黎世报》文章写道，曾就“慰安妇”问题公开道歉的日本政治家河野洋平的去世，标志着日本政坛自由派力量的衰败。

articles.title: 少子化加劇競爭？「高考神話破滅」下的中國青年
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/少子化加劇競爭？「高考神話破滅」下的中國青年/a-77522265?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中國今年高考報考人數下降，但競爭依舊激烈。專家指出，未來少子化趨勢下，壓力恐怕不減反增。多位高考生向DW談到他們如何在「內卷」的教育環境下成長，沒有「躺平」的本錢，也越來越難相信靠學歷翻轉人生的「高考神話」。
